description.name: Casa del Mar
description.headline: Seafront villa with private pool on the Costa Brava
description.description:
Wake up to the sound of the Mediterranean at Casa del Mar, a bright villa perched above a quiet cove in Begur. The open-plan living area opens onto a large terrace with a private pool and uninterrupted sea views. Four bedrooms sleep up to eight guests in comfort.

The fully equipped kitchen, outdoor BBQ and shaded dining area make it easy to host long lunches, while the coastal path to the beach starts at the garden gate.

reviews: Absolutely stunning villa. The pool and sea views were everything we hoped for and the kitchen had everything we needed to cook for the whole family.
Spotlessly clean and the terrace is incredible at sunset. The walk down to the cove takes about ten minutes. We'll be back.
Perfect for our group of eight. Plenty of space, great BBQ evenings, and the host was very responsive.

policies.cancellation_policy: Full refund if cancelled at least 30 days before check-in; 50% refund up to 14 days before.
policies.payment_schedule: 30% deposit at booking, balance due 30 days before arrival.
